objective: On branch codex/deployed-smallwood-no-counterfeit-closure, close the four deployed SmallWood no-counterfeit mechanized tracks with an exact production constraint map, canonical cross-object identity, and accepted-block supply composition; remove the selectable Plonky3 transaction backend from the executable dispatch; preserve runtime and testnet compatibility; run all focused, aggregate, adversarial, release, native-smoke, and headless security validation; open a draft pull request; and drive all required GitHub checks green without merging or deploying.
objective_must_contain: close the four deployed SmallWood no-counterfeit mechanized tracks
remove the selectable Plonky3 transaction backend from the executable dispatch
measurement_method: Recompute the weighted average of config/highest-standard-formal-verification-matrix.json property completion percentages. The formal-surface percentage is valid only when measured in a stable paused, blocked, or complete goal state, every required property id and weight matches the fixed highest-standard theorem set, completed properties have no missing_work or remaining_work, completed properties list current evidence and explicit external assumptions, the matrix overall percent equals the recomputed weighted percent, and this ledger matches both. Mechanized assumption closure is recomputed separately against the checker's fixed track and closed-theorem policy; the public active-goal command also requires every credited theorem in the formal security claims set, rejects symlinks in the formal source tree, verifies formal_source_tree_blake3 against both the deterministic path-and-byte digest of every formal/lean/**/*.lean file and an independent Rust-held expected digest, and runs aggregate Hegemon elaboration plus the axiom audit before emitting a passing result.
external_assumption_boundary: 100% here means complete under the checked matrix method with explicit named cryptographic assumptions, explicit proof-system assumptions, and explicit fail-closed system-model assumptions. It is not a claim of assumption-free primitive crypto, deployed proof-system soundness, DA retention, storage hardware semantics, external bridge soundness, global traffic-analysis privacy, scanner completeness, or live release-infrastructure honesty.
acceptance_gates: cargo run --quiet --manifest-path scripts/hegemon_formal_core/Cargo.toml -- check-blueprint config/formal-security-blueprint.json --claims config/formal-security-claims.json
